one_time_description: Investment income from Community Development Trust of $9,874,157 representing trust income distributed to the First Nation; also prior period restatement adjusting Community Development Trust and long-term debt balances
economic_notes: Nation operates Woodland Cree Industries Ltd., Woodland Cree Energy Inc., Woodland Cree Exploration Inc., 1024044 Alberta Ltd., and Peace River Logging (50%). Investments include Indigenous Bloom Corp., Megalodon Energy Corp., and Bloom Traditional Tobacco. Community Development Trust managed by Peace Hills Trust with market value of $48,202,298. WCFN-Weaver Limited Partnership dissolved September 2020. COVID-19 additional funding of $2,773,483 received from ISC.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - auditors unable to obtain sufficient evidence about investments in First Nation owned companies. Prior period restatement for fiscal 2020: Community Development Trust decreased by $4,364,487, long-term debt decreased by $1,410,645, opening accumulated surplus decreased by $2,953,842. Five GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Community Development Trust consolidated as a subsidiary. ISC funding includes $2,773,483 in COVID-19 additional funding. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $4,000,801 + KTC $10,944,492 + CMHC $108,529 = $15,053,822 plus Government of Alberta $12,450 = $15,066,272; First Nation Development Funds $81,216 included as government transfer giving $15,134,822 approximate. OSR = total revenue $26,067,012 minus government transfers $15,134,822 = $10,932,190 (includes investment income from trust, investment income, interest, Ottawa trust income, other revenue).
